appnote:
- Fix video loading hang: added timeouts to API calls (was stuck indefinitely)
- Reduce provider timeout from 12s to 10s for faster fallback
- Skip Senshi provider when no MAL ID available
- Return clear error when media data fails to load
- Log ExoPlayer errors instead of silently swallowing them
